sidebar.skinsNeedAccount: Skins require a Microsoft ship's log
sidebar.viewPrevLog: View the previous session's log arr

account.addAnotherMicrosoft: Sign on another Microsoft ship's log
account.addOffline: Sign on an offline ship's log
account.reloginTitle: Yer Microsoft session expired - sign in again
account.addToPlay: Sign on one to set sail
account.cookiesResetToast: Microsoft sign-in reset - onward sign-in starts fresh
account.clearCookiesTitle: Clears the cached Microsoft web session so ye can sign into a different ship's log
account.noAccounts: Nay accounts yet. Sign in wit' Microsoft to set sail online, or sign on an offline ship's log below.
account.offlineHint: Fer single-player an' offline-mode ports. Can't join online (premium) ports.

instances.title: Instances arr
instances.emptyFolder: Empty - drag a card in 'ere, or assign one from the ⋮ menu on a card.

onboarding.welcomeBody: A fast, modern Minecraft launcher wit' modpacks, skins, the high seas an' more booty. Let's take a minute to set things up the way ye like.
onboarding.themeBody: Pick a theme an' accent colour. Changes apply instantly - watch the launcher refit as ye choose.
onboarding.importBody: Brassworks can import instances from Prism Launcher an' the Modrinth App - mods, configs an' the high seas come along (Prism groups become chests).
onboarding.importLater: Nay rush - ye can always import later from the “+ Sign on instance” menu.
onboarding.featuredBody: Featured packs an' ports sign on a curated port to yer list plus live player counts an' news on the Set sail screen. Ye can alter this anytime in Riggin'.
onboarding.featuredToggleDesc: Featured packs, the featured port, player counts an' news.
onboarding.ramBody: This be the as she lies RAM fresh instances get. Modded packs want more booty; vanilla be happy wit' less. Ye can fine-tune per instance later.
onboarding.rpcBody: Reveal what ye be playin' in yer Discord status. Purely cosmetic - flip it off if you'd rather keep it private.
onboarding.rpcToggleDesc: Display yer current modpack in Discord.
onboarding.languageBody: Brassworks be in English today, wit' more booty languages on the way. You'll be able to a hand translate it soon.
onboarding.signInBody: Sign in wit' Microsoft to set sail online an' use skins, or sign on an offline ship's log fer single-player.
onboarding.signInLater: Ye can skip this an' sign in later from the ship's log menu.
onboarding.doneBody: That's it - ye be ready to set sail. Ye can revisit everythin' 'ere from Riggin' whenever ye like. Have fun!

tabIntro.onceNote: A quick intro - you'll only see this once arr.
tabIntro.instances1Body: Each modpack or make be its own instance wit' separate mods, the high seas an' riggin'.
tabIntro.instances2Body: Drag instances into colour-coded chests, pin favourites, an' switch to compact mode.
tabIntro.instances3Body: Forge custom instances or haul aboard from Modrinth, CurseForge, packwiz, or other launchers.
tabIntro.play1Body: Hit Set sail to set sail. The selected instance shows 'ere wit' its status an' live progress.
tabIntro.play2Body: Pin handy riggin' - RAM, branch, flavors - to the right-side card fer one-click tweaks.
tabIntro.content1Body: Scout an' haul aboard content from Modrinth an' CurseForge straight into this instance.
tabIntro.content2Body: Modpack-managed content be locked so updates stay clean - unlock it to sign on yer own.
tabIntro.worlds1Body: See every the high seas in this instance wit' its seed an' last-played time.
tabIntro.worlds2Body: Jump straight into a the high seas - Brassworks launches the game right to it.
tabIntro.servers1Body: Manage ports, reorder favourites, an' join wit' one click - whole rows be clickable.
tabIntro.screenshots1Body: Scout, hoist an' manage the screenshots taken in this instance.
tabIntro.skin1Body: Each preset bundles a skin, model an' cape. Selectin' one applies it to yer ship's log - the selected preset be what ye wear in-game.
tabIntro.skin2Body: Built-in presets be startin' points. Hover a preset an' hit Duplicate to get an editable copy ye can freely alter.
tabIntro.skin3Body: Hoist the Tinker (pencil) button on a preset to rechristen it, swap the skin PNG, switch classic/slim, or pick a cape - then stow an' choose it.

settings.title: Riggin'
settings.subtitle: These be launcher-wide defaults. Per-instance overrides live on each instance's gear (Instances → ⚙).

language.title: Language arr
language.hint: English be the as she lies an' the fallback fer anythin' not yet translated.
language.pseudoDesc: Replace translated text wit' x's so any untranslated UI stands out. Fer testin'.

replay.title: Replay the ahoy tour
replay.desc: Replay the first-set sail setup an' the per-tab intro cards.

resetAll.title: Reset all launcher riggin'
resetAll.desc: Restores every launcher settin' to its as she lies. Yer instances, chests an' accounts be untouched.
resetAll.tooltip: Reset all launcher riggin' to defaults

memory.title: As she lies memory
memory.note: Fresh instances inherit these. Override memory per instance on its gear.

start.title: When the game starts arr
start.consoleLaunch: Hoist the console on set sail
start.consoleQuit: Hoist the console on abandon ship

window.title: As she lies game window
window.sizeHint: The size Minecraft opens at by as she lies.

commands.title: Commands arr
commands.preHint: Runs in a shell afore the game starts.
commands.postHint: Runs in a shell after the game closes arr.

appearance.title: Appearance arr
appearance.themeHint: “Match system” follows yer OS light/dark settin'. “Grey” be the as she lies soft dark; “OLED” be true black.
appearance.accentHint: Recolours buttons, sliders an' highlights across the app an' every theme.
appearance.highContrastDesc: Stronger borders an' brighter text on top o' yer theme.
appearance.closeTrayDesc: Keep runnin' in the system tray when ye batten down the window.

integrations.title: Integrations arr
integrations.rpcDesc: Reveal what ye be doin' in yer Discord status.

featured.title: Featured content arr
featured.toggleDesc: Reveal featured packs in the Instances tab, featured ports in port lists, an' the live player count an' news tiles on the Set sail screen. Turn off fer a clean, self-curated launcher.

curseforge.title: CurseForge arr
curseforge.keyHint: Browsin' works out o' the box. Set yer own key only if you'd rather not use the bundled one.
curseforge.getKey: Get a CurseForge API key arr →

downloads.title: Plunder
downloads.parallelHint: How many scrolls be fetched / verified at once when installin' or updatin' a modpack. Higher be faster; lower be gentler on slow connections. Pick Sequential to strike.

cache.title: Cache arr
cache.desc: Modrinth & CurseForge data the launcher re-plunder as needed. Safe to clear.

updates.title: Updates arr
updates.autoDesc: Check fer an' haul aboard launcher updates on startup.
updates.latestToast: Ye be on the latest make

java.whichHint: Automatic plunder an' caches the exact make each instance needs. Override this per instance on its gear.
java.none: None yet - the right runtime plunder automatically on first set sail.
java.temurin: Temurin (Adoptium) JREs. The correct make also plunder automatically per instance.

instanceSettings.subtitle: Instance riggin' - overrides apply only to this instance.

export.title: Export modpack arr
export.desc: Bundle this instance's added content into a shareable modpack scroll (stowed to yer Plunder chest).

mods.unlockBody2: . This may break yer modpack an'
mods.unlockBody3: . Lock it again to restore the modpack an' updates.
mods.updatePickDesc: Pick which o' yer added mods to refit to the latest compatible make. Modpack-managed mods be ne'er touched.
mods.managedLocked: Part o' the modpack - managed automatically
mods.upToDate: Everythin' be already up to date
